description: Verified VizieR catalogs for UCD literature compilation

verified_catalogs.notes: Coma cluster UCDs with NIR properties

verified_catalogs.title: A Fresh View of Ultracompact Dwarfs: Size, Luminosity, or Mass - What Is the Driving Force Behind the Diverse UCD Formation Scenarios?
verified_catalogs.notes: Classic review with compiled UCD properties - sizes and luminosities

verified_catalogs.title: A Population of Compact Elliptical Galaxies Detected with the Virtual Observatory
verified_catalogs.notes: Compact ellipticals - related to UCDs, includes isolated cEs

Use ADS to find papers citing these for additional sources
